name: Build a complete n8n automation
description: Designs and implements a production-ready n8n workflow with proper error handling, retries, logging and system integrations.

steps.title: Map the flow
steps.prompt_template: Map the complete flow. Trigger: {trigger}. Goal: {goal}. Systems: {integrations}.

steps.title: Validate integrations
steps.prompt_template: Research the best way to integrate {integrations} in n8n.

steps.title: Build the workflow
steps.prompt_template: Build the n8n workflow for: {goal}. Add error handling: {error_handling}.

steps.title: Test and document
steps.prompt_template: Add {error_handling} and test with sample data. Document each node.

author: fluxrow
